productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Adi Stylite Low Black Silver Shoe
description: The Adi Stylite 3 lifestyle fitness shoe from adidas is an excellent running shoe. Offering superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish, these shoes easily double up as casual lifestyle footwear. Team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look.UpperCombination of nylon and rubber upper with stitches for extended durability Three glossy rubber overlays across the sides of the upper for added structure to the shoe and brand motto symbolizing performance, perseverance and achievementSynthetic central lacing for snug FitLightly padded collar for comfort fitSlightly raised heel cup for added style and extra protection and support to the backfootMidsoleLightly padded insole for fitness trainingEVA injected midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleTPU outsole for excellent gripVertical grooves below the arch for added tractionPivot point on big toe mound for easy 180° movement of the forefoot without causing injuryTextured below the lateral forefoot and the heel for excellent gripWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
